name: OAuth Per-User (Tenant) RLS Scoping
description: Adds per-user (tenant) row-level security to the thoughts table for an OAuth 2.1 resource server. Scopes all reads and writes by user_id = auth.uid() (the JWT sub claim), keeps client_id as non-scoping provenance, grants the authenticated role the necessary table and function privileges, and redefines upsert_thought / match_thoughts as SECURITY INVOKER so per-request Supabase clients only ever see their own tenant's memory.
